collections.subject: ELA
curriculum_scope: Beginning Word Types: Nouns, Verbs, Adjectives, Pronouns
Sentence Writing: Subjects, Predicates, Commas, Compound Subjects/Predicates
Nouns & Paragraphs: Plural, Possessive, Concrete/Abstract; Paragraph structure
Word Parts & Letters: Prefixes, Suffixes, Homophones, Friendly Letter
collections.reviewer_notes: Trusted homeschool publisher. 73 individual videos to be expanded via YouTube Data API (playlistItems.list). Whole-course pre-approval recommended pending content spot-check.

collections.subject: ELA
curriculum_scope: Beginning Word Types: Nouns, Verbs, Adjectives, Pronouns
Sentence Writing: Subjects, Predicates, Commas, Compound Subjects/Predicates
Word Parts: Prefixes, Suffixes, Homophones; Friendly Letter
collections.reviewer_notes: Older edition of Miacademy Level D — 27 grammar/writing lessons. User has used successfully with struggling 6th graders, so grade range tagged 3-6. Pre-populated lesson slots in MIACADEMY_EDITION_1_LESSON_SLOTS. Expand via API for real video metadata.

collections.subject: ELA
curriculum_scope: Unit 3: Close Reading Skills (Summarizing, Inferences, Citing Evidence, Author Purpose, POV, Main Idea)
Unit 5: Poetry (Meter, Alliteration, Haiku, Odes, Free Verse)
Unit 6: Fiction (Characters, Plot, Conflict, Foreshadowing, Theme)
Unit 7: Traveling Through Grammar (Pronouns, Sentence Fragments, Formal/Informal Writing)
Unit 8: Expository Writing (Research, Essay Structure, Revising)
collections.reviewer_notes: Miacademy 6th-grade Language Arts. Playlist contains 18 of ~70 lessons in the full course — a curated highlight reel covering all 10 units. Per teacher usage, suitable for grades 6-7. Pre-populated lesson slots in MIACADEMY_LEVEL_G_LESSON_SLOTS. Expand via API for real video metadata.

collections.subject: ELA
curriculum_scope: Unit 1: Fiction (Elements of Fiction, Close Reading)
Unit 4: Poetry (Elements of Poetry, Analyzing Poems)
Unit 5: Nonfiction (Central Idea, Words in Context)
collections.reviewer_notes: Miacademy 8th-grade Reading Comprehension subset of Level I. Playlist is 8 of ~36 lessons covering genre intros (fiction/literary nonfiction/drama/poetry/nonfiction) + central idea + words in context + a sample novel study. Pre-populated lesson slots in MIACADEMY_READING_COMP_8_LESSON_SLOTS. Expand via API for real video metadata.

collections.subject: ELA
curriculum_scope: Parts of Speech: Nouns (5 lessons), Verbs (3 lessons), Adjectives (3 lessons), Adverbs, Pronouns
Word Study & Vocabulary: Prefixes, Suffixes, Synonyms, Antonyms
Reading Comprehension: Main Idea, Theme, Context Clues, Fact/Opinion, Author's Purpose, Compare/Contrast, Cause/Effect, Sequence
collections.reviewer_notes: Mind Blooming channel — 29 elementary ELA videos with confirmed YouTube IDs (not placeholders). Per teacher use, suitable for grades 3-5. Status=READY_FOR_REVIEW since titles + IDs are real; teachers just need to approve/reject content quality.

collections.subject: ELA
curriculum_scope: Themed reading units: Funny Business, Crossing the Line, To Your Health, Hindsight is 20-20, Identity, Heroes & Heroines
Close reading lessons per unit (literary fiction, informational text, memoir, biography)
Reading comprehension skills: central idea, theme, characterization, point of view, tone/mood, author's purpose, text structure, citing evidence, summarizing
Vocabulary: word relationships (connotation/denotation), vocabulary in context, Greek & Latin roots, figurative language
collections.reviewer_notes: Khan Academy 8th-grade Reading & Vocabulary — 30 videos organized as 6 themed units × 5 lessons each. Standards-aligned to CCSS 8th grade. Pairs well with Khan's free practice exercises on khanacademy.org for blended learning. Pre-populated lesson slots in KHAN_8_LESSON_SLOTS. Expand via API for real video metadata.

collections.collection_name: Khan Academy: 5th Grade English Language Arts
collections.subject: ELA
curriculum_scope: Context clues for word meaning (L.5.4a / RI.5.4)
collections.reviewer_notes: Khan Academy 5th-grade ELA — 11 videos focused on core CCSS 5th-grade reading & language skills. Older skill-focused playlist (predates Khan's newer themed reading & vocab courses for grades 4 and 5). Pre-populated lesson slots in KHAN_5_LESSON_SLOTS. Expand via API for real video metadata.

collections.collection_name: GRASPhopper: Text Structure of Nonfiction Texts
collections.subject: ELA
collections.reviewer_notes: GRASPhopper Learning text structure playlist. 4 of 5 video IDs confirmed via search; sequence video has placeholder pending API expansion. All 5 videos target the same skill (text_structure) and cover the 5 classic nonfiction text structures students must master for state tests in grades 3-5.
